name: CERA Sports Park & Campground
description:
First come first served basis or reserve a court on Court Reserve.
Appropriate tennis shoes or soft soled shoes only.
Proper court etiquette and sportsmanship required.
Use of pickleball equipment only.
Please wait outside the finish for others to finish.
Be aware surface is slippery when wet.
Please dispose of trash in receptacles.
Skateboards, scooters, bicycles, rollerblades, skates, glass bottles, smoking/vaping are prohibited.
Shoes, chairs, or any other items that may mark the court are not allowed.
open_play_schedule: First come first served basis or reserve a court through Court Reserve.
fees: Fee required — Daily entry $5/player and you will pay at the front gate or Sport and Fitness Center. If court reservation, fees are $10/hour with a 1 hr. minimum. This $10 fee reserves the court and c

name: Donner Park
description: First come, first served. Paddle racks for each court to rotate in. During peak times, 8A-Noon or 5-10P; 2 games max to 11 win by 2, or 30 min., whichever is less; 4 players in/4 players out, Doubles takes precedence over Singles.  No food, drinks, alcohol, or chairs on courts. For pickleball use only. Courtesy, respect, & good sportsmanship are an expectation of all players at all times.

name: Foundation For Youth
description: There are Recreational, Competitive, and All Levels scheduled times.

name: Mill Race Center
description: One court indoors on floor, only Recreational players 1.0-3.0. A/C and heat.

fees: Fee required — Free to Mill Race Center members or purchase a day pass for $10

name: W D Richards Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at W D Richards Elementary School in Columbus, IN! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Reservations are not available.
